'''Eriadu Customs and Immigration''' was an [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriaduan]] governmental agency in charge of customs and immigration in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The agency deployed picket ships bearing its emblem.

The creature [[Chack]] was in the employ of the customs agency before being killed in 32 BBY. The quadruped had sniffed out contraband being brought in to the [[Eriadu Spaceport]] by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arwen Cohl]]'s crew during the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]], but was killed before additional customs forces could be alerted to the danger.
